title: × Coeloglosshabenaria jacksonii
taxonomy: × Coeloglosshabenaria jacksonii is classified as a hybrid of the genera Coeloglossum and Habenaria, which are both part of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant is a rare and endemic species to the tropical regions of Africa. Specifically, it is native to the tropical regions of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. As a hybrid, its classification can be complex and is often determined through botanical analysis. Further study is needed to fully understand the plant's classification and its relationship to other orchid species.
